2026-04-08T19:20:43.7272270Z state without impacting any branches by switching back to a branch.

2026-04-08T19:20:43.7285332Z do so (now or later) by using -c with the switch command. Example:
2026-04-08T19:20:43.7286002Z 
2026-04-08T19:20:43.7288398Z   git switch -c <new-branch-name>
2026-04-08T19:20:43.7288885Z
